channel.title: bench on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in bench on IT notes

item.title: Go Benchmarking
item.description: To exclude all the tests and just run the benchmarks: go test -run=^$ -bench=. Profile: go test -cpuprofile=cpu.out -benchmem -memprofile=mem.out -run=^$ -bench= Using pprof: CPU: go tool pprof <your-binary>.test cpu.out MEM: go tool pprof -alloc_objects <your-binary>.test mem.out Go Tooling in Action
